analyst_observations: The with_skill configuration demonstrates superior performance across all metrics. Notable improvements: (1) Pass rate increased 12.5% (0.875 to 1.0) - with_skill achieved perfect 4/4 evals, baseline failed 2/4 (system-design missing tradeoff section, tech-debt flagged false alarm). (2) Execution speed dramatically improved - with_skill averages 35.5s vs baseline 126s (3.5x faster), driven by tech-debt without_skill taking 6.7 minutes (400s). (3) Token efficiency improved - with_skill used 64,948 tokens/eval vs baseline 73,230 (10% fewer). Code review and standup performance identical (1.0 pass rate on both), but system design and tech-debt show clear skill advantage. The skill enables more focused, structured outputs that better meet evaluation criteria. The baseline's tech-debt audit, while thorough, investigates a non-issue (flags false alarm on dual DB) and lacks explicit tradeoff analysis in system design, suggesting the skill coaching improves output quality and relevance.
